nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I need the writing to strike a balance between 'corporate professional' to appease management, but also to not be too stiff or informal so I can win over the team

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: The collaboration is entirely born of errors. Either I'm not asking the question correctly, or haven't been specific enough. Or the AI hasn't found the correct answer

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It would probably be faster to ask AI, but there's an esoteric quality to hunting for a miniscule error in lines of code

nodes.label: AI as tool for critical thinking about AI
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me sharpen my critical thinking skills about specific problems, so I can ask the right questions

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: They encourage AI use and are promoting it while a vendor works on a chatbot, but then they send out a list of 'ten banned generative AI sites'

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to use AI to collaborate further on higher-level thinking projects

nodes.label: Effective professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to be judged negatively by either group

nodes.label: Personal problem-solving enjoyment and skill preservation
Critical thinking and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me sharpen my critical thinking skills

nodes.label: Informed decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: I feel comfortable making decisions about what to use it for

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI when specific prompts work
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it produces something I'm extremely impressed by on the first try

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't pick up on the subtle nuances of navigating a mixed group

nodes.label: Preference for self-debugging despite inefficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It would probably be faster to ask AI, but there's an esoteric quality to hunting for a miniscule error

nodes.label: Frustration with AI iteration management
nodes.grounding_span: I spent a couple hours on that, and trying the solutions it kept providing unsuccessfully so many times was exhausting

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to use AI to collaborate further on higher-level thinking projects

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: there is often a back and forth, with me refining or rephrasing my question

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting based on knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I have more knowledge than the average person about how AI works as well as information security, so I feel comfortable making decisions
